title: Fix admin login with passcode sastra2026 and resolve canister stopped error

requirements.summary: Display user-friendly error messages for backend/canister errors on Admin Login page
acceptanceCriteria: When the backend returns a canister-stopped or replica rejection error, the login page shows a clean, readable error message instead of the raw JSON/error blob
The error message does not expose internal canister IDs or request IDs to the user

file_operations.description: Add error message transformation logic to catch backend errors (IC0508, replica rejections, canister stopped errors) and display a user-friendly message such as 'Service temporarily unavailable. Please try again.' in the error toast. Replace the current error handling in the adminLogin mutation's onError callback to parse error messages and hide internal canister IDs, request IDs, and raw error JSON from users.
